sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91776" key="purogenh/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡρογενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πυρός</etym>) <sense id="n91776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made from wheat,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.368</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
